description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomous mode was making a right turn from Bryant Street onto 9th Street when a vehicle overtaking from the rear 
switched lanes as it drove in front of the Zoox vehicle and made contact with the front Zoox sensors. The other party left the scene. The 
police were not called and there were no injuries.
Print
Clear Form
